title: Mini Walter
description: This resource pack changes the totem of undying texture into Walter from breaking good.
body:
**WANT A MINI WALTER IN YOUR WORLD? YOU’RE IN LUCK!**

---

This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying texture with WALTER.

That’s it. Just **WALTER**! nothing more, nothing less.

![Walter being a totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/439636d8b8825f5a501e545d6e8303693b671b28.png)

**---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

Here is a side by side comparison between the regular totem and **WALTER**

![Glow up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69e25d5d888f6f6ddf2b96d71406d9d0a89f80f.png)

Credits to @cash4credit for suggesting **WALTER**.

Fan-made parody. Not affiliated with AMC or Breaking Bad.
